{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Galactic Union Intelligence
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Galactic Union Intelligence]] believed [[Herta]] was a specialist in viral engineering.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c17">''The Pilot'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“If you’re gifted in prosthetics, then why does Galactic Union Intelligence seem to believe that you’re a specialist in viral engineering?”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
